meta.title: Michael Doran Delivers Remarks to UN Security Council, June 20, 2017
meta.description: On June 20, 2017, Hudson Senior Fellow Michael Doran delivered remarks to a United Nations Security Council briefing titled "The situation in the Middle East, including the Palestinian question."
